intro: Corypha laevis, commonly known as the Smooth Corypha, is a species of palm tree native to tropical Asia, characterized by its slender trunk and feathery leaves. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, with health benefits including the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects.
